speaker: Seeker
text: Par kisi ko bolun ki mujhe support chahiye toh lagta hai pagal samjhenge, phir se freeze ho jaati hoon.

text: Chalo teen chhote options rakhte hain. Pehla: 2 minute mein ek line likho - 'Main blame nahi, school next step discuss karungi.' Doosra: 8 slow breaths + paani. Teesra: ek trusted insaan ko short text bhejo - 'Aaj heavy hai, bas sun lo.'

text: Breathing aur line likhna doable lag raha hai, warna dimaag sunn ho gaya jaisa snap aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh karke chest halka lag raha hai, hulchul thodi kam hui hai.

speaker: Supporter

strategy_intent: Divorcee + disability stigma context mein ek baar systemic pattern.
text: Divorcee mothers jinke bachchon ko extra support chahiye, unmein yeh pattern bahut common hai - din bhar ladna, raat ko tootna. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin manhoos tag ki wajah se koi khulke bolta nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke halka laga. Koi raasta hai kya jab panic aaye aur main phir dher ho gayi jaisa feel karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 2 + readiness par teen chhote options.
text: Teen halke steps try karte hain: pehle 8 slow breaths + paani; doosra ek line likho - 'Main blame nahi, next practical step discuss karungi'; teesra trusted ko text - 'Aaj heavy hai, bas 5 minute sun lo.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing aur line wala doable hai, poora sharir thanda pad gaya wala freeze kam karne mein help karega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek suggestion step-by-step, prescribed format.
text: Chalo abhi sequence follow karte hain. Pehle yeh karo: seedha baitho, kandhe dheele. Phir yeh karo: 4 count saans andar, 6 count bahar, 8 rounds. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar liya, body thodi warm feel ho rahi hai, ghabrahat kam hui.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 + disability stigma structural reframe, pehli baar.
text: Disability care aur social stigma jab judte hain, body ka freeze ya collapse response common hota hai. Yeh weakness nahi, overload ka signal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa raha hai, warna har baar lagta tha dil baith gaya matlab main kamzor hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next line anchor ke liye ek concrete question.
text: Ghar mein kal zikr uthe toh pehli sentence tum kya bolna chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bolungi: 'Main blame pe nahi, bache ke next support step pe baat karna chahti hoon.'

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do backup lines dena.
text: Backup ke taur par do line save karo: 'Awaaz upar gayi toh main 10 minute break lungi.' aur 'Mujhe support chahiye, taana nahi.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh lines simple hain, freeze se pehle poora sharir thanda pad gaya wala loop rokne mein help karengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Worth validate karna, divorcee + health load reality.
text: Zabardast, tumne beech ke dard mein bhi clear tools choose kiye. Manhoos tag aur bache ki zarurat dono heavy hain, par tumhari koshish kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab thoda grounded lag raha hoon, ghabrahat spike kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Notes prep micro-step.
text: Raat ke liye chhota kaam: notes app mein teen bullet - fact, ask, break-line. Stress aaye toh bas wahi dekhna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar lungi, usse dil baith gaya wala spiral kam hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Doosra systemic reframe, blame pattern.
text: Chronic care stress mein families kabhi uncertainty ko personal taanon mein nikaal deti hain. Yeh pattern tumhari poori identity nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh gayi, har comment mera final verdict nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Pehla concrete step lock karna.
text: Baat yahan khatam hote hi pehla step kya logi - notes save ya trusted text?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle notes save karungi, phir trusted text bhejungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Plan reinforce karna.
text: Sahi direction, tumne aaj overwhelm se nikalke practical control liya hai. Yeh chhote steps milkar bada farq laate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, ab saans normal lag rahi hai aur baat karne ka darr kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure lens D.
text: Naye jhatke ke baad tum ab dheere-dheere step-wise mode mein aa rahi ho, aur yeh shift waqt ke saath aur mazboot hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aatma kaanp gayi meri unki baat sunkar, jaise kisi ne meri koshishon aur akelepan ka mazaak udaya ho. Bas dimaag blank ho gaya jaisa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se overwhelm mirror karna, stressor rush nahi.
text: Uski baat ne tumhe poori tarah se jhakjhor diya hai, jaise neeche se zameen khisak gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul aisa hi, body bhi heavy hai aur main bas dher ho gayi jaisi mehsoos kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe samay ke load ko mirror karna.
text: Kaafi time se tum isi bhaag-daur ke neeche dab rahi thi, aur ab ek aur jhatke se sab phir se hil gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bache ki wellbeing ke liye din bhar bhaag-daur, phir rejection ki baat aayi aur phir se aatma kaanp gayi jaisa feel hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se implied fear surface karne ke liye ek question.
text: Jab rejection ka zikr dimaag mein aata hai, sabse zyada kis nateeje ka darr tumhe satata hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr yeh hai ki sab bolenge maine kuch nahi kiya, aur dimaag itna bhara hai ki soch hi nahi aa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relational judgement aur akelapan mirror karna.
text: Tumhari mehnat aur akelepan dono ko ek saath ignore kar diya ja raha hai, aur woh bahut chubh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Roti hoon toh bolte natak, chup rahun toh bolte attitude. Phir se aatma kaanp gayi jaisa lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad chhota restatement, lens F.
text: Rone ka space bhi tumhare liye mehfooz nahi lagta...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, log kya kahenge ka darr alag hai, aur upar se main bas dher ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role zimmedari clarify karne ke liye ek question.
text: Sabse pehle tum kis cheez ko bachane ki sabse zyada koshish kar rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas bache ko stable rakhna... par lagta hai main har jagah kam pad gayi, isliye dimaag itna bhara rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 par exhaustion aur shame of needing help reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai ke tum itna thak chuki ho phir bhi lad rahi ho, aur madad maangna bhi tumhe darrata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bolungi toh lagta hai log bolenge handle nahi kar sakti, phir freeze ho jaati hoon, aatma kaanp gayi jaisa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short restatement, lens F.
text: Shabdon ko nikalna bhi tumhare liye khatra jaisa lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
